title: Lebanese Hold Fast to Their Land Despite Threat of Long Israeli Occupation
summary_full: Entire towns in southern Lebanon have been hollowed out by the war between Israel and Hezbollah. Some residents have stayed, fearing permanent displacement.
summary_public: Entire towns in southern Lebanon have been hollowed out by the war between Israel and Hezbollah. Some residents have stayed, fearing permanent displacement.

LB.label: negative
LB.evidence: Entire towns in southern Lebanon have been hollowed out
